Payroll Deductions Formulas – 122nd Edition

Effective January 1, 2026

These formulas are effective from January 1, 2026 to June 30, 2026.

Chapter 2 – Federal net income tax

Step 1 – Federal income tax (FIT)

Use the following annual tax rates (R) and annual constants (K) to calculate the federal income tax deduction.

Table 1 – Annual tax rates and annual constants for federal net income tax
Annual net income (A) ($) Federal tax rate (R) Annual constant (K) ($)
0.00 to 58,523.00 14% 0.00
58,523.01 to 117,045.00 20.5% 3,790.00
117,045.01 to 181,440.00 26% 10,228.00
181,440.01 to 258,482.00 29% 15,670.00
More than 258,482.00 33% 26,009.00

Basic personal amount (BPA)

The federal basic personal amount for 2026 is as follows:

  • The maximum basic personal amount is $16,452.00 for employees whose net income is $173,205 or less.
  • The minimum basic personal amount is $14,538.00 for employees whose net income is $246,752 or more.
  • For employees with net income between those amounts, the BPA is prorated.

Chapter 7 – Ontario

Ontario provincial tax

Basic personal amount: $11,865.00

Table – Ontario provincial tax rates
Annual net income (A) ($) Provincial tax rate (R) Annual constant (K) ($)
0.00 to 51,446.00 5.05% 0.00
51,446.01 to 102,894.00 9.15% 2,107.00
102,894.01 to 150,000.00 11.16% 4,176.00
150,000.01 to 220,000.00 12.16% 5,676.00
More than 220,000.00 13.16% 7,876.00

Chapter 8 – British Columbia

British Columbia provincial tax

Basic personal amount: $11,981.00

Table – British Columbia provincial tax rates
Annual net income (A) ($) Provincial tax rate (R) Annual constant (K) ($)
0.00 to 45,654.00 5.06% 0.00
45,654.01 to 91,310.00 7.70% 1,206.00
91,310.01 to 104,835.00 10.50% 3,760.00
104,835.01 to 127,299.00 12.29% 5,637.00
127,299.01 to 172,602.00 14.70% 8,706.00
172,602.01 to 240,716.00 16.80% 12,327.00
More than 240,716.00 20.50% 21,241.00

Chapter 9 – Alberta

Alberta provincial tax

Basic personal amount: $21,003.00

Table – Alberta provincial tax rates
Annual net income (A) ($) Provincial tax rate (R) Annual constant (K) ($)
0.00 to 148,269.00 10% 0.00
148,269.01 to 177,922.00 12% 2,965.00
177,922.01 to 237,230.00 13% 4,744.00
237,230.01 to 355,845.00 14% 7,117.00
More than 355,845.00 15% 10,676.00
